title: Planner Framework Control Bundle
description: Validates per-control YAML Framework Skills authored under any framework or capability skill at .github/skills/<collection>/<framework-id>/controls/*.yml. Authoring contract RI-1..RI-5: assessmentMethod enum is closed; gates default to pending; $id is required and must be a URL; evidenceHints are paths/globs; identifiers are lower-kebab.

id.description: Lower-kebab framework or capability Framework Skill identifier (RI-5)

version.description: Bundle version (semver or framework-native version string)

source.description: Authoritative URL for the framework or capability definition

id.description: Lower-kebab control identifier; dots permitted for hierarchical IDs (e.g., pw.4.1)

group.description: Optional group or family identifier within the framework (e.g., PO, PS, PW, RV for SSDF)

assessmentMethod.description: How adoption is assessed (RI-1; closed enum)

categories.description: Required when assessmentMethod is categorical; lower-kebab labels (RI-5)

gates.description: Phase gates that depend on this control

mapsTo.description: Cross-framework mapping; keys are framework IDs, values are lists of control IDs in that framework

evidenceHints.description: File paths or globs that typically provide evidence for this control (RI-4; no prose)

id.description: Lower-kebab identifier for the equivalent implementation

tool.description: Concrete tool, action, or artifact name (e.g., 'actions/attest-build-provenance')

rationale.description: Why this implementation is functionally equivalent (shared trust roots, primitives, or interfaces)

equivalentImplementations.description: Optional list of functional equivalents. Planners must score presence of any listed equivalent as full credit (verified) for this control rather than partial.

discriminator.description: Short label for the applicability axis (e.g., 'project-type', 'role')

appliesWhen.description: Values of the discriminator under which this control applies

naWhen.description: Values of the discriminator under which this control should be scored n/a

naReason.description: Reason text the planner must record when scoring this control n/a under naWhen

applicability.description: Optional applicability discriminator. Planners use this to decide whether the control is in scope for the current project (e.g., self-published OSS vs. acquired upstream supplier).

id.description: Lower-kebab identifier shared across mutually-substitutable controls

rationale.description: Why these alternatives are mutually substitutable (e.g., 'SPDX 2.3 and CycloneDX 1.5 are interchangeable SBOM formats')

alternativeGroup.description: Optional grouping that marks this control as one of several mutually substitutable alternatives. When any control in the group is verified, planners must score the unused members n/a with reason 'alternative format selected' (or equivalent).

appliesTo.description: FSI v1.0 sustainability surface tags. Subset of the per-framework surfaceFilter. Planners filter controls by the active workload mix at runtime.

measurementClass.description: FSI v1.0 sustainability extension. Declares the epistemic class of any numeric output the control produces (e.g., SCI energy term as 'estimated').

sciVariable.description: FSI v1.0 sustainability extension. Maps the control to one of the four SCI=(E*I+M)/R variables when applicable.

appliesToPrinciples.description: FSI v1.0 sustainability extension. Cross-walk to gsf-principles bundle item ids (validator emits a warning when the bundle is loaded but a referenced item is missing).
